## Change

Describe the observable behavior changed and why.

## Evidence boundary

State whether the change handles observed, mapped, derived, inferred, replayed, or unavailable evidence.

## Verification

- [ ] Typecheck and lint
- [ ] Focused unit tests
- [ ] Memory evals when lifecycle behavior changes
- [ ] Distribution test when packages or CLI change
- [ ] Browser smoke when UI behavior changes

## Data safety

- [ ] No credentials, production memories, raw user traces, or generated Studio artifacts are included
